neighborhoods.name: Pontiac / Downtown
neighborhoods.description: Former auto city experiencing revival with arts district, ethnic restaurants, and Phoenix Center
neighborhoods.character: Auto city revival, arts district, diverse dining

housing.predominantType: Lofts, apartments, and renovated commercial buildings

neighborhoods.character_notes: The historic and commercial heart of Pontiac. Most walkable area with best access to cultural attractions, restaurants, and public services.

neighborhoods.name: Royal Oak / Ferndale
neighborhoods.description: Walkable inner suburbs with vibrant downtown strips, craft breweries, and progressive communities
neighborhoods.character_notes: Established residential area offering a quieter lifestyle while maintaining reasonable access to Pontiac's center and services.

neighborhoods.name: Waterford / White Lake
neighborhoods.description: Lake communities with affordable housing, recreational lakes, and suburban amenities

housing.predominantType: Lake houses, ranch homes, and modest properties

neighborhoods.character_notes: More affordable option for budget-conscious retirees. May require a car or longer transit times to reach central amenities.

neighborhoods.name: Troy / Rochester Hills
neighborhoods.description: Northern suburbs with top-rated schools, Somerset Collection, and family-oriented communities

housing.predominantType: Colonial houses and newer single-family homes

neighborhoods.character_notes: Family-friendly area with good schools, parks, and community amenities. Popular with active retirees and families.
